message:
Close bead u0v: Implemented adaptive color system for UI

- Added Background enum, ColorLevel enum, AdaptiveColor struct
- Implemented detect_background(), detect_color_level(), detect_hyperlink_support()
- Added palette constants for semantic colors (subtle, highlight, success, error, warning, info)
- Integrated adaptive colors into OutputContext with new methods
- All 92 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
